scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && npm-run-all -p dev:backend dev:frontend
scripts.kill-ports: lsof -ti :4317 :5173 2>/dev/null | while read pid; do kill -9 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; done; exit 0
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm --workspace grove-app run build
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm --workspace grove-app run build && npm --workspace grove-app run start
scripts.dev:all: npm run kill-ports && npm --workspace grove-app run build && npm-run-all -p dev:backend dev:frontend dev:electron
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && GROVE_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm --workspace grove-app run start
